ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn how to develop, deploy and iterate on production-grade ML applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
Language: jupyter-notebook
Official code repo for the O'Reilly Book - "Hands-On Large Language Models"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1.6 - A Foundation Model for Generalist Robots.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/GenAI_Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/GenAI_Agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository provides tutorials and implementations for various Generative AI Agent techniques, from basic to advanced. It serves as a comprehensive guide for building intelligent, interactive AI systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. RAG systems combine information retrieval with generative models to provide accurate and contextually rich responses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-mlp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-mlp
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, and Hugging Face libraries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: awslabs/amazon-bedrock-agentcore-samples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/awslabs/amazon-bedrock-agentcore-samples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Amazon Bedrock Agentcore accelerates AI agents into production with the scale, reliability, and security, critical to real-world deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bbruceyuan/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models-CN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bbruceyuan/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models-CN
Language: jupyter-notebook
中文翻译的 Hands-On-Large-Language-Models (hands-on-llms)，动手学习大模型

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dusty-nv/jetson-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dusty-nv/jetson-containers
Language: jupyter-notebook
Machine Learning Containers for NVIDIA Jetson and JetPack-L4T

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 weeks, 26 lessons, 52 quizzes, classic Machine Learning for all

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mml-book/mml-book.github.io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mml-book/mml-book.github.io
Language: jupyter-notebook
Companion webpage to the book "Mathematics For Machine Learning"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
In-depth tutorials on LLMs, RAGs and real-world AI agent applications.
